title: Teltonika TSW202 Managed PoE+ Switch
description: Teltonika TSW202 is an industrial PoE switch designed for harsh environments. It has a PoE budget of 240 W . As it is an L2+ switch, it offers some features from L3, such as DHCPv6 client or static routing for IPv4 and IPv6. The switch also supports most industrial protocols, including EtherNet/IP, MRP, and Profinet . A DIN rail mount is built into the device. All LAN ports provide speeds up to 1 Gbps and support PoE+ Note that TSW202 PoE ports works properly when switch is powered using PSU, which can supply 44-57 VDC. If TSW202 switch is powered with voltages ranging from 7 VDC to 43 VDC, it will work as standard switch, without PoE capabilities PoE budget 240 W Some features from L3 Support for industrial protocols Speed on all LAN ports up to 1 Gbps and PoE+
